description: Machine-readable source of truth for the WasmAgent project index. Lists every repository in the organization with its category, role, status, and visibility. Consumed by the org profile (profile/README.md project table) and the living roadmap (docs/roadmap.md) so the public project matrix is rendered from a single registry instead of maintained by hand, preventing omissions. Each repo also carries a `focus` field (see focus_legend) marking its place relative to the core spine and its long-term lifecycle.

status_legend.shipped: Public repository exists and is the source of truth for its layer.

focus_legend.core-spine: Mission core: evidence, verification, trust. Sustained long-term investment.
focus_legend.planned-core: Planned addition to the core spine; repo not yet created.
focus_legend.adjacent: Extends the spine to a surface; moves to community maintenance once its roadmap lands.
focus_legend.product: Commercial product surface downstream of the spine.
focus_legend.research: Research project; results and interfaces may change.
focus_legend.reference-workload: Reference workload / Golden Path fixture producer, not a general product.
focus_legend.internal: Internal automation or operations; ships no public product.
focus_legend.planned-workload: Planned reference workload; repo not yet created.

categories.project-home: Public landing page that directs readers to the org hub.
categories.org-hub: Org-wide documentation, ledgers, and source of truth for the project list.
categories.evidence-pipeline: Trace ingestion, evidence admission, and training audit.
categories.trust-artifacts: Machine-readable identity and policy posture artifacts.
categories.internal-tool: Internal automation or operations; ships no public product.
categories.verification: Symbolic verification and sandbox execution backend.

repos.name: .github
repos.summary: Organization portal and sole public entry point: profile, roadmap, claims registry, release ledger, RFC registry, and cross-repo documentation.

repos.name: wasmagent-js
repos.summary: Embedded agent runtime v1.x: WASM kernels (QuickJS, Pyodide, Wasmtime, Remote), MCP gateway + attestation, AEP emitter, capability manifests; adapters for A2A, AG-UI, AI SDK, Claude Agent SDK.

repos.name: bscode
repos.summary: Coding-agent workload on Cloudflare Workers — AEP evidence export, deny capabilities, output taint labels, RolloutProvenance.

repos.name: trace-pipeline
repos.summary: evomerge on PyPI — eval_trust paired statistics, AgentTrustScore stable JSON schema, training-data admission gate, wasmagent-js v1.x schema compatible.

repos.name: agent-trust-infra
repos.summary: AgentBOM, MCP Posture, and Trust Passport spec, reference impl, and CLI; EU AI Act Annex IV compliance mapping in draft (covers 20/29 sub-items, deadline 2026-08-02).

repos.name: open-agent-audit
repos.summary: Enterprise audit product with AEP v0.3 adapter; deployed at trustavo.com. Packages: @openagentaudit/core, adapters, schema.

repos.name: fresharena
repos.summary: Dynamic, verifiable, adversarial evaluation — FAEP schema, submit-then-test adversarial testing, Public Immunity Pool; technical paper in preparation.

repos.name: claude-bot
repos.summary: Internal automation: issue triage, PR review, and cross-repo coherence patrol. Not a public product.

repos.name: wasmagent-ops
repos.summary: Internal operations hub: generators, release ops, eval, research, and continuous verification daemon that monitors running agents and alerts on trust-policy violations. Not a public product.

repos.name: erp-agent
repos.summary: Planned ERP-domain workload with order-state and ledger verifiers, mirroring the role bscode plays for coding tasks.

repos.name: symkernel
repos.summary: Go-based symbolic verification backend for the WasmAgent ecosystem: cel-go lightweight rules, wazero Wasm sandbox hard-isolation, Z3 SMT satisfiability proofs. HTTP service with OPA-style request/response envelope; language-agnostic — consumed by wasmagent-js and future wasmagent-py via a thin adapter.

repos.name: wasmagent-proxy
repos.summary: Proxy-Wasm Rust module for Envoy, Istio, Kong, and Consul: intercepts Agent/MCP/A2A HTTP traffic, applies validation→delta→full recording policy, emits PROV-DM AEP records signed with Ed25519 (DSSE). Joins with wasmagent-js mcp-firewall via shared trace_id for full causal coverage from gateway to tool call.

repos.name: wasmagent-train-replay
repos.summary: Causal evidence layer for distributed GPU training: reads PyTorch Flight Recorder dumps, builds cross-rank PROV-DM provenance graphs, records Ed25519-signed EpochEvidenceBundles, and supports deterministic replay and tensor-origin tracing. Shares AEP schema and RecordingMode semantics with wasmagent-js.

repos.name: wasmagent-py
repos.summary: Planned Python agent runtime — sibling to wasmagent-js. Will share AEP schema, Criterion/ConstraintIR protocol, and symkernel HTTP adapter so Python agents receive the same evidence recording, MCP policy enforcement, and symbolic verification as the JS runtime.
